name: oracle_select_ai_agent
description: Select AI-style inventory analysis agent. It can answer natural-language questions over the demo risk tables using DBMS_CLOUD_AI when a profile is configured, and otherwise falls back to direct Oracle SQL summaries.

skills.name: select-ai-analyst
skills.description: Natural-language analyst for Oracle inventory and warehouse risk data.

skills.name: answerInventoryQuestion
skills.description: Answer an inventory-risk question, optionally using DBMS_CLOUD_AI.GENERATE with a configured Select AI profile.
